title: Voice Chat & Optimizations
description: Come explore the world of Minecraft with new biomes and have an in-game voice chat mod!
body:
This modpack was created for some friends.

 

Voice Chat & Optimizations is a Fabric based modpack for Minecraft 1.19.2.  It is a simple modpack containing the Simple Voice Chat mod, Oh The Biomes You'll Go Refabricated, and various optimizations to make your game run better.

 

Mod List -

    Iris Shaders
    Simple Voice Chat (Allows Voice Chat In-Game)
    Lithium
    Logical Zoom (Similar to Optifine Zoom)
    Nature's Compass
    Oh The Biomes You'll Go Refabricated (Adds more biomes to the Overworld, Nether, and The End)
    Phosphor
    Sodium
    Sound Physics Remastered

 

This modpack makes it easier for lower end computers to create new experiences using in-game voice chat and new biomes!
